event.title: USCG renewal packet, mail to National Maritime Center
event.notes: Master 50 GT renewal, ref 4417829. License expires December 31, 2026. Do not let it lapse.

event.title: Deliver Martin D-28 to Walter Hensley
event.notes: Work order BGW-1051. Balance due 925 dollars at pickup.

event.title: Charter, Pruitt party, offshore 8 hour
event.notes: Booking BK-2026-0418, 4 anglers. Russ mates. Backup date October 25. Weather call by 5 AM.

event.title: American Legion Post 99 fall fish fry, lead fry
event.notes: Veterans Day. Setup at 2 PM, serving 5 to 7:30. Diane plating. Grouper and mullet, 60 lbs.

event.title: Insurance payment due, Gulf Coast Marine
event.notes: Policy GCM-0042817, 4,200 dollars. Renewal effective December 1, 2026.

event.title: Thanksgiving at the cottage, Marcel cooking
event.notes: Marcel cooks. Luc, Ashley, Elise, Beau, Diane. Fryer for the turkey.

event.title: Boat haul out and bottom paint
event.notes: Offseason. Bottom paint, running gear service. Budget from maintenance reserve.
